zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Fitz Randolph於大約1475年出生在英國越可爾斯尼恩時，他的父親Randolph FitzRandolph19歲，母親Edith Scrope24歲。他於大約1490年與Elizabeth Morton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年11月8日在英國素可列維斯享年78歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯尼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Fitz Randolph于大约1475年出生在英国越可爾斯尼恩时，他的父亲Randolph FitzRandolph19岁，母亲Edith Scrope24岁。他于大约1490年与Elizabeth Morton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年11月8日在英国素可列維斯享年78岁，埋葬在英国越可爾斯尼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Randolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Randerson
meanings: English (West and East Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Randolf (see Randolph ) + -son. In East Anglia the name may also have been influenced by a form of the now rare or extinct Rendlesham, itself from the place of that name in Suffolk. The placename probably derives from an Old English personal name Rendel (genitive Rendeles) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

variants.name: Randolf
meanings: English and German: variant of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Fitz Randolph was born about 1475, in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, his father, Randolph FitzRandolph, was 19 and his mother, Edith Scrope, was 24. He married Elizabeth Morton about 1490, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1552, in Lewes, Sussex, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Fitz Randolph est né environ 1475, à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Randolph FitzRandolph, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Edith Scrope, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Morton environ 1490, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1552, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Fitz Randolph um 1475 in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randolph FitzRandolph 19 und seine Mutter Edith Scrope 24. Er hat um 1490 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1552 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England und wurde in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Fitz Randolph è nato il circa 1475 nel Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Randolph FitzRandolph, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Edith Scrope, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Morton circa 1490, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1552, nel Lewes, Sussex, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Fitz Randolphが約1475年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルンで生まれた時，父Randolph FitzRandolphは19歳，母Edith Scropeは24歳であった。約1490年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年11月8日にイギリススセックスルスで78歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Fitz Randolph(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 요르크실르 스펜이토른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randolph FitzRandolph(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith Scrope(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 11월 8일 영국 수세스 루스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스펜이토른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Fitz Randolph nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Randolph FitzRandolph, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Edith Scrope, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Morton aproximadamente 1490, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1552, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Fitz Randolph родился около 1475 г. в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Randolph FitzRandolph было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith Scrope, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Morton около 1490 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1552 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Fitz Randolph nació aproximadamente 1475, en Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Randolph FitzRandolph, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Edith Scrope, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Morton aproximadamente 1490, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1552, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
